meta.title: Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios | Dinosaur Theme Park
meta.description: Explore Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios in Orizaba, Veracruz, Mexico. Experience amazing dinosaur exhibits and interactive experiences.

intro.title: Explore Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios
intro.description: Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios is located in Orizaba, Veracruz, Mexico. It is an amazing theme park featuring realistic dinosaur models, interactive exhibits, and family-friendly entertainment facilities. Here, you can travel back to the Jurassic era and experience the charm of dinosaurs up close.

visitGuide.title: Visiting Tips
items: Open Thursday to Sunday, plan your trip in advance
Visit realistic dinosaur models and interactive exhibits
Great for family visits, allow 3-4 hours
Bring sun protection and water, mostly outdoor activities

alsoKnownAs.title: Highlights
items: Realistic Dinosaur Models: Various sized dinosaur models displayed throughout the park, lifelike and impressive.
Interactive Experiences: Participate in archaeological digs, dinosaur egg hatching, and other interactive activities.
Educational Value: Perfect for children to learn about dinosaurs, combining education with entertainment.
Prime Location: Located in Orizaba with convenient transportation and many nearby attractions.

route.title: Tour Route
route.overview: Discover the ideal route to explore Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios and experience the charm of the prehistoric world.
steps: Arrive at the park entrance in the morning and get a map and visitor guide at the visitor center.
Visit the main exhibition area and admire various realistic large dinosaur models.
Participate in the interactive experience zone, try archaeological digging and dinosaur knowledge quizzes.
Have a meal at the rest area in the park, then continue visiting other exhibition areas or buy souvenirs.
supplements: Prepare sun protection, most areas in the park are outdoors.
Wear comfortable shoes for long walks.
Bring a camera to capture wonderful dinosaur models and interactive moments.

knowledge.title: Discover the Charm of Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios

sections.title: Educational Significance
sections.content: Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios is a theme park that combines entertainment with education. Through realistic dinosaur models and interactive exhibits, visitors especially children can learn about the history and knowledge of the dinosaur era.

sections.title: Interactive Experiences
sections.content: The park offers various interactive experience programs, including simulated archaeological digging, dinosaur egg hatching experiences, etc., allowing visitors to personally experience the fun of exploring the prehistoric world.

sections.title: Visiting Experience
sections.content: Stroll among realistic dinosaur models and feel the shock of the prehistoric world. This is an unforgettable family outing experience, allowing you and your children to get close to the dinosaur world.

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.addressValue: Priv. de Circunvalación, Agrícola Moctezuma, 94345 Orizaba, Ver., Mexico

hours.title: Opening Hours
hours.warningTime: Recommended to verify latest opening information before visiting
hours.tip: Open Thursday to Sunday, please plan your trip accordingly

tickets.title: Ticket Information
tickets.tipsPriceValue: Online ticket purchase may have discounts

transport.title: Transportation
transport.airportDesc: The nearest major airport is Veracruz International Airport (Aeropuerto Internacional General Heriberto Jara, Code: VER), about 1.5 to 2 hours drive from Orizaba. Upon arrival, you can rent a car or take a long-distance bus (such as ADO bus) to Orizaba city, then take a taxi to the park.
transport.selfDriveDesc: The park is located in Orizaba. Use navigation and check for parking nearby.
transport.busDesc: Take public transportation to Orizaba, then take a taxi or local bus to the park.
transport.intercityDesc: From downtown Orizaba, take a taxi or local bus to the park.
transport.cyclingDesc: Taxis or driving recommended, convenient transportation around the park.
transport.tipsDesc: Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios is an excellent place to experience the charm of the prehistoric world, afternoon visits recommended.

items.name: Juan Carlos
items.text: A fun and educational place. The dinosaur models are very realistic, children love it, highly recommended for all family visitors.

items.name: María Elena
items.text: Amazing theme park. The dinosaur models are very realistic, interactive experiences are fun, a must-visit place in Orizaba.

items.name: Roberto Silva
items.text: Very interesting place to learn about dinosaur knowledge. Afternoon visits recommended when the weather is cooler.

items.name: Ana Torres
items.text: Perfect for family outings. The dinosaur models are impressive, interactive programs are fun, definitely worth experiencing.

items.name: Miguel Herrera
items.text: Interesting outdoor experience. You can see dinosaur models up close, bring sun protection.

items.name: Sofía Méndez
items.text: Hidden gem of Orizaba. Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios is children's favorite, definitely bring family to experience.

items.name: Laura Vargas
items.text: Unforgettable experience. The dinosaur models are very realistic, children learned a lot, very worth visiting.

items.name: Carlos Rivera
items.text: Great place for family outings. The dinosaur theme is very interesting, allow enough time to enjoy all programs.

officialManagement.title: About Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios
officialManagement.text: Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios is a famous theme park in Orizaba, featuring realistic dinosaur models and rich interactive experiences, an ideal choice for family outings. The park is managed by the Orizaba City Government (Ayuntamiento de Orizaba).

historyTimeline.title: Park Development Timeline

items.title: Park Foundation
items.description: Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios was established to provide visitors with entertainment venues to understand the dinosaur world. The park initially had basic dinosaur models and simple exhibition facilities.

items.title: Facility Improvement
items.description: The park continuously developed, adding more realistic dinosaur models, interactive experience zones, and educational programs, becoming an important tourist attraction in Orizaba.

items.title: Tourist Destination
items.description: With the development of tourism in Orizaba, Expo Parque de los Dinosaurios attracts more and more family visitors with its unique dinosaur theme and rich interactive experiences.

items.title: Continuous Development
items.description: The park plans to continue expanding, adding more dinosaur models and interactive experience programs, committed to becoming one of the most popular family entertainment venues in Mexico.

historyTimeline.guideContent: When visiting, you can start with the **main exhibition area** to admire realistic dinosaur models; then participate in activities such as archaeological digging in the **interactive experience zone**; next, have a meal and rest at the **rest area**; finally, select dinosaur-themed souvenirs at the **souvenir shop** to leave wonderful memories.
